steps.title: Support early discovery
steps.content: The statement says modern technology has made hoards easier to find, but many were found earlier. The completion needs table evidence of hoards discovered before the twenty-first century.

steps.title: Reject weak table evidence
steps.content: Choice B misstates Carrick-on-Suir as a twentieth-century discovery. Choice C gives only one hoard and assigns the wrong date to Balline. Choice D includes a later discovery, which weakens the claim about earlier finds. The table evidence with two pre-2000 hoards best supports the point. The answer is A.
